title: Feta olive salad
description: This super simple salad works great with [roasted chicken and potatoes](/recipes/air-fried-chicken-wings/)…
ingredients:
- Feta cheese
- olives
  *mix of green and black*
- olive oil
- cumin seeds
- coriander seeds
- fennel seeds
steps:
1. Cut the Feta cheese into 2 cm cubes.
2. In a bowl, add the feta cheese, olives, and a bit of olive oil.
3. Grind the cumin, coriander, and fennel seeds into the salad.
4. Thoroughly mix everything.
